meta.note: Placeholder stub. The DOLA Apartment Rent Survey PDF is published quarterly but the URL is WAF-blocked from CI. To populate: download the PDF locally and run `python scripts/parse_dola_rent_survey.py`. Until then the deal-calculator cap pane gracefully omits the DOLA line and falls back to ZORI / Apartment List / ACS B25064. This stub exists to eliminate the 404 the site-audit was flagging — the code already handles empty regions/counties arrays as a soft-miss.
